# PS1 world positions and rotations for each exported mesh
# Generated by Blender RSD exporter
#
# Scale factor used: 150.0
#
# Position values are already multiplied by the scale factor.
# Rotation values are in PS1 fixed-point units (ONE=4096 = 360 degrees).
# Use these in InitialiseModel() calls in your C code.
#
# Format:
#   Mesh      RSD file    X        Y        Z        rotX   rotY   rotZ
#
# C code example:
#   InitialiseModel(&leon_L00, X, Y, Z, rotX, rotY, rotZ, (long*)LEON_L00_MEM_ADDR);
#

# Object: car200  (Blender name: Car2)
InitialiseModel(&leon_CAR200, 0, 0, 0, 1024, 0, 0, (long*)LEON_CAR200_MEM_ADDR);
